# Agent Hints

## Environment Setup

## Known Traps

<!-- Document gotchas discovered during development. Add to this list over time. -->
<!-- Examples: -->
<!-- - Do not run `npm install` inside subdirectories; always run from repo root. -->
<!-- - The `db:seed` script resets all test data; do not run against production. -->
<!-- - Test order matters in the auth suite; run with --runInBand if tests fail randomly. -->

## Test Infrastructure Notes

<!-- Document test setup, fixtures, and patterns. -->

<!-- - Use the `createTestUser()` factory from test/factories.ts for user fixtures -->
<!-- - Snapshot tests are in __snapshots__/ directories; update with --updateSnapshot -->
